name: BBQ Pork Lo Mein
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook noodles in plenty of boiling water until al dente, then drain and toss with sesame oil. Set aside.
2. Combine the sauce ingredients (broth, oyster sauce, soy sauce, sugar, and pepper) in a bowl. Set aside.
3. Heat the wok, add oil. Add ginger and stir fry for about 10 seconds until fragrant.
4. Add bok choy, bean sprouts, and pork to the wok. Stir fry for 2 minutes.
5. Pour in the broth and cook until hot.
6. Add noodles, cover, and cook for 2 minutes.
7. Add the sauce mixture, stir well, and serve.
